generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure is making us vulnerable? While strategic autonomy sounds good in theory, it's putting our national security at risk. We can't afford to cut ties with our allies just to chase an unrealistic dream of self-sufficiency. Our safety depends on strong partnerships, not isolation. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
